mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_oper_log ( user_id, username, module, action, method, request_url, request_method, request_params, response_result, status, error_msg, cost_time, oper_ip, oper_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{module}, #{action}, #{method}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{costTime}, #{operIp}, NOW() )
